message: 🌱 Add etcd: Is there a plan to update google.golang.org/grpc? mission (#371)

@@ -0,0 +1,77 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "etcd-11650-is-there-a-plan-to-update-google-golang-org-grpc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "etcd: Is there a plan to update google.golang.org/grpc?",
+    "description": "Is there a plan to update google.golang.org/grpc?. This issue affects 42+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Identify etcd feature symptoms",
+        "description": "Check for the issue in your etcd deployment:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=etcd\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error\n```\nLook for errors related to: Is there a plan to update google.golang.org/grpc?"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Check current resource configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant etcd resources:\n```bash\nkubectl get resource -A\nkubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>\n```\nDo you mind update the  google.golang.org/grpc to v1.27.0?"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Is there a plan to update google.golang.org/grpc?",
+        "description": "Fix #11650 #11563\n```yaml\n# github.com/coreos/etcd/clientv3/balancer/picker\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/picker/err.go:37:44: undefined: balancer.PickOptions\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/picker/roundrobin_balanced.go:55:54: undefined: balancer.PickOptions\r\n# github.com/coreos/etcd/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint/endpoint.go:114:78: undefined: resolver.BuildOption\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/cl\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Confirm Is there a plan to update google.golang.org/grpc? is resolved",
+        "description": "Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:\n```bash\nkubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=etcd -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m\nkubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm that the issue symptoms are gone."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "This issue was resolved by applying the fix from the linked PR. The root cause was identified and addressed by the community.",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "# github.com/coreos/etcd/clientv3/balancer/picker\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/picker/err.go:37:44: undefined: balancer.PickOptions\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/picker/roundrobin_balanced.go:55:54: undefined: balancer.PickOptions\r\n# github.com/coreos/etcd/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint/endpoint.go:114:78: undefined: resolver.BuildOption\r\n.../go/pkg/mod/github.com/coreos/etcd@v3.3.18+incompatible/clientv3/balancer/resolver/endpoint/endpoint.go:182:31: undefined: resolver.ResolveNowOption",
+        "Works when I run\r\n`go run main.go -name first`\r\n\r\nBut at the time to vendoring it has the same issue \r\n`go mod init && go mod tidy`\r\nand then\r\n\r\nI got",
+        "If I run\r\n`go mod vendor`\r\nand then \r\n`go run -mod=vendor main.go -name first`\r\n\r\nI get"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
